ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., English Premier League) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "league_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Manchester United) */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the match belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Home Win, Away Win, Draw) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "match_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "shots_on_target_home" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "shots_on_target_away" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "corners_home" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "corners_away" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "fouls_home" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "fouls_away" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "yellow_cards_home" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the home team */,
  "yellow_cards_away" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the away team */,
  "red_cards_home" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the home team */,
  "red_cards_away" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the away team */,
  "possession_home" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the home team */,
  "possession_away" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the away team */,
  "pass_accuracy_home" REAL /* Percentage of accurate passes by the home team */,
  "pass_accuracy_away" REAL /* Percentage of accurate passes by the away team */,
  "offsides_home" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the home team */,
  "offsides_away" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the away team */,
  "saves_home" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the home team's goalkeeper */,
  "saves_away" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the away team's goalkeeper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odd */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the odd belongs to */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker */,
  "home_odds" REAL /* Odds for the home team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw */,
  "away_odds" REAL /* Odds for the away team to win */,
  "odd_date" TEXT /* Date when the odds were set */,
  "over_under" REAL /* The over/under betting line */,
  "over_odds" REAL /* Odds for the over */,
  "under_odds" REAL /* Odds for the under */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2018-2019) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the season */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer in the season */,
  "top_scorer_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the top scorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total number of minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Total number of successful dribbles by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total number of successful tackles by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the bookmaker */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the bookmaker is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the bookmaker was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)
